result.seo_title: Beginner Cardio Workout Plan for 4 Weeks
result.seo_content: This 4-week beginner cardio workout plan is designed to improve your cardiovascular health with simple, effective exercises. With just 3 sessions per week, each lasting 30 minutes, you'll gradually build endurance and enjoy increased energy levels. Perfect for beginners, it incorporates walking, cycling, and light bodyweight exercises to get you moving and motivated.
result.seo_keywords: Beginner cardio plan, 4-week workout, cardio exercises for beginners
